goal: Conduct a rigorous forensic audit of the v10 microstructure overlay result to confirm, downgrade, or reject it as a genuine improvement over the immutable baseline.
global_constraints: v11 is audit-only: no new features, no new directional scouts, no early-cut, no label changes.
Immutable reference is active-signal-v1@1 — never modify the baseline.
All comparisons must use the same lockbox window for base and overlay.
Short-only, long-only, and combined veto must be tested as separate runs — never aggregated into a single story.
Leakage, reference, window, and snapshot audits must complete before any interpretive conclusion.
Simple rule-based overlay must be validated before model-backed overlay.
PROMOTE status is only valid if v10 survives the entire forensic cycle.

slices.title: Snapshot assembly audit
slices.hypothesis: Verify that the veto overlay was integrated causally — no retroactive trade blocking or mixed long/short logic.
slices.objective: Verify that the veto overlay was integrated causally — no retroactive trade blocking or mixed long/short logic.
success_criteria: Causal verdict per snapshot variant: decision timing OK, causal blocking OK, side isolation OK, no mixed logic.
evidence_requirements: Causal verdict per snapshot variant: decision timing OK, causal blocking OK, side isolation OK, no mixed logic.

slices.title: Same-window matched reruns
slices.hypothesis: Run immutable base and all overlay variants on the identical lockbox window to produce an unambiguous comparison.
slices.objective: Run immutable base and all overlay variants on the identical lockbox window to produce an unambiguous comparison.
success_criteria: Matched same-window comparison table with all four routes completed and metrics computed.
evidence_requirements: Matched same-window comparison table with all four routes completed and metrics computed.

slices.title: Cannibalization and ownership audit
slices.hypothesis: Prove the overlay genuinely improves the system by removing bad trades, not by masking problems or destroying profitable coverage.
slices.objective: Prove the overlay genuinely improves the system by removing bad trades, not by masking problems or destroying profitable coverage.
success_criteria: Ownership/cannibalization verdict per route with quantified removed-loser share, removed-winner share, and coverage-loss risk.
evidence_requirements: Ownership/cannibalization verdict per route with quantified removed-loser share, removed-winner share, and coverage-loss risk.
